title: Failure to parse standard cell definition
body:
verilator --version
Verilator 4.200 2021-03-12 rev v4.110-43-g5022e81af (mod)



test case - test.sv:
```
`celldefine
module BHDBWP20P90CPDLVT (Z);
    inout Z;
    not (weak0, weak1) (Z, Z_buf);
    not                (Z_buf, Z);

endmodule
`endcelldefine

```


verilator --cc ~/test.sv                                                                                                         
```
%Error: /user/trs/test.sv:4:9: syntax error, unexpected (-for-strength, expecting '('
    4 |     not (weak0, weak1) (Z, Z_buf);
      |         ^
%Error: Exiting due to 1 error(s)

```

This passed using Cadence Xcelium:

```
xrun ~/test.sv

TOOL:	xrun	20.09-s001: Started on Mar 17, 2021 at 14:07:10 GMT
xrun: 20.09-s001: (c) Copyright 1995-2020 Cadence Design Systems, Inc.
file: /user/trs/test.sv
	module worklib.BHDBWP20P90CPDLVT:sv
		errors: 0, warnings: 0
		Caching library 'worklib' ....... Done
	Elaborating the design hierarchy:
	Top level design units:
		BHDBWP20P90CPDLVT
xmelab: *W,DSEMEL: This SystemVerilog design will be simulated as per IEEE 1800-2009 SystemVerilog simulation semantics. Use -disable_sem2009 option for turning off SV 2009 simulation semantics.
	Building instance overlay tables: .................... Done
	Building instance specific data structures.
	Loading native compiled code:     .................... Done
	Design hierarchy summary:
		     Instances  Unique
		Modules:     1       1
		Primitives:  2       1
	Writing initial simulation snapshot: worklib.BHDBWP20P90CPDLVT:sv
Loading snapshot worklib.BHDBWP20P90CPDLVT:sv .................... Done

```
